footer.copy: © 2026 VELOCITY PERFORMANCE RENTALS. ENGINEERED FOR SPEED.

historyFeatures.description: We were born from a harsh reality: the rise of silent bike theft and the lack of immediate assistance during isolated accidents. We realized that traditional locks are passive and vulnerable systems that fail to provide real peace of mind.
historyFeatures.problem_text: We identified that urban riders and emergency teams lack instant alert systems. Theft happens within seconds, while response times often take hours. BiciSmart IoT breaks this cycle by transforming the bicycle into an intelligent node capable of defending itself and requesting help autonomously.
historyFeatures.feature_1_text: We implemented a real-time tracking system with dynamic geofencing. If your bike leaves the authorized radius, the microcontroller instantly triggers a critical alert directly to your smartphone.
historyFeatures.feature_2_text: Using precision accelerometers, we detect sudden falls or collisions. In case of an incident, the system automatically sends your exact location to emergency contacts without manual intervention.
historyFeatures.feature_3_text: BiciSmart IoT hardware is compact and energy-efficient (NB-IoT), engineered to remain invisible to thieves while resisting harsh environmental conditions.

infoPage.mission_text: We observed that urban riders face increasing levels of insecurity. Traditional protection systems are passive. BiciSmart IoT was created to deliver an intelligent, accessible, and discreet solution capable of tracking bicycles 24/7 and sending alerts during dangerous situations.
infoPage.card_1_text: Instant push notifications every time the microcontroller detects irregular movement.
infoPage.card_2_text: Compact hardware with long battery life that naturally adapts to the bicycle’s geometry.

whyus.subtitle: Designed to protect, built to connect. The new era of smart security for urban cyclists and athletes.

features.title: 24/7 Tracking
features.desc: Real-time GPS tracking powered by IoT/SIM technology and Bluetooth Low Energy for uninterrupted monitoring.

features.title: Smart Alerts
features.desc: Instant push notifications whenever irregular movement or security tampering is detected.

features.title: Crash Detection
features.desc: Analytical sensors (accelerometer and gyroscope) automatically send SOS alerts to your emergency contacts.

pricing.title: Our Plans
pricing.install: Each subscription requires a prior installation fee of S/ 60

items.q: Why is there an installation fee?
items.a: BiciSmart hardware uses industrial-grade microcontrollers. The S/ 60 fee covers the device, sensor setup and discreet installation.

items.q: What network technology do you use?
items.a: We use LTE-M / NB-IoT combined with Bluetooth Low Energy to maintain connectivity even in low coverage areas.

items.q: How does the SOS signal work?
items.a: The accelerometer and gyroscope detect crashes or sudden falls and automatically send your GPS location to emergency contacts.

items.q: Is it compatible with any bicycle?
items.a: Yes. The universal design allows discreet and secure installation on virtually any bicycle.

contact.hero_desc: Access the most advanced cyclist protection system on the market. IoT engineering designed for people who never compromise their safety.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.terms_5: regarding monitoring and protection of my vehicle.

cta.description: Track location, receive instant alerts, and access all your bicycle information from a single platform.
